hero.title: AI for Roofing Businesses
hero.description: Your AI virtual assistant helps roofing businesses manage calls, book roof inspections, capture job details, follow up on quotes, and keep projects moving — without interrupting on-site work.

stats.label: Fewer missed roofing enquiries with 24/7 call answering.
Reduction in time spent on admin and scheduling.
Higher quote acceptance with faster follow-ups.

blocks.heading: Modern Solutions for the Roofing Industry
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that every call to a roofing business could be an urgent repair, replacement, or inspection request. Our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every enquiry is answered promptly and professionally.

blocks.heading: Focus on Roofing Work, Not Phone Calls
blocks.description: While your team is on-site inspecting roofs or completing projects, your AI Receptionist manages incoming calls and customer questions. It confidently answers enquiries like 'Can I book a roof inspection?' or 'Do you handle roof repairs and replacements?' with high professionalism.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Roofing Opportunity
blocks.description: Whether during peak periods, after hours, or while on-site, your AI Receptionist ensures no enquiry is missed. It clearly explains your services — from repairs and restorations to full roofing installations — and books inspections.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Boost your roofing business with intelligent automation that saves time, captures more leads, and improves client communication.

cards.title: Professional First Impression
cards.description: Your roofing business sounds polished and reliable on every single call.

cards.title: Automated Roof Inspections
cards.description: Book site inspections, consultations, and follow-ups automatically.

cards.title: Customised for Your Business
cards.description: Train your AI to match your specific roofing services, pricing, and workflow.

cards.title: 24/7 Availability
cards.description: Never miss an urgent leak or storm damage enquiry, even after hours.

cards.title: Secure & Confidential
cards.description: Customer details, addresses, and roofing project notes are handled safely.

cards.title: Improved Client Experience
cards.description: Polite communication, quick reminders, and schedule updates build solid trust.

cards.title: Time-Saving Automation
cards.description: AI handles repetitive scheduling and booking admin so you stay productive on-site.

cards.title: Higher Lead Conversion
cards.description: Consistent and swift follow-ups keep homeowners engaged with your business.

cards.title: Centralised Job History
cards.description: Access past quotes, roofing reports, site notes, and photos anytime.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Roofers Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Roofing companies across Australia trust our AI Virtual Receptionist to manage calls, schedule inspections, and capture job details. It integrates seamlessly with your scheduling tools and CRM, acting as an extension of your team.

card.heading: Streamline Quote Management and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each inspection, you can record quick voice notes that are transcribed and summarised automatically. The AI manages follow-up reminders for quotes, insurance approvals, and timeline updates, keeping jobs moving forward.

items.title: Specialised Roofing Services
items.description: Support roof restorations, re-pointing, metal roofing, and tile repairs.

summary.description: A client calls to request an inspection for a leaking roof. The AI books the roof inspection, captures system details, and sends confirmation automatically.
